videoSnippet.title: Not a Single Game was Drawn! || Awonder vs Hikaru || Training Match 2026

Nakamura, Hikaru (2742) - Liang, Awonder (2511)
Nakamura - Liang Training Match (Chess.com) [05] 2026.03.15
C20 KP, Indian opening

1.e4 e5 2.d3 Nc6 3.Nc3 Nf6 4.g4 Ng8 5.Be3 Bb4 6.a3 Ba5 7.Bg2 Nge7 8.b4 Bb6 9.h4 d6 10.g5 Be6 11.Qf3 Qd7 12.Nge2 O-O-O 13.Nd5 Kb8 14.c4 Bg4 15.Nxb6 axb6 16.Qg3 f5 17.gxf6 gxf6 18.b5 Na5 19.Rb1 Rhg8 20.Qh2 f5 21.f3 fxe4 22.fxe4 Rdf8 23.Nc3 Bf3 24.Rg1 Qg4 25.Bg5 Ng6 26.Bh3 Qh5 27.Be6 h6 28.Bxg8 hxg5 29.Bd5 Nxh4 30.Kd2 Bg2 31.Kc1 Qf3 32.Rb2 Qxd3 33.Nd1 Nb3+ 34.Rxb3 Qxb3 35.Rxg2 Rf1 36.Rd2 Nf3
